# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-metrics-collector
  namespace: monitoring
  labels:
    app: metrics-collector
    team: platform
    istio-bypass: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: metrics-collector
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: metrics-collector
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
        prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
        prometheus.io/port: "9090"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: metrics-collector
          image: prom/prometheus:v2.45.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 9090
              name: http-metrics
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /-/ready
              port: 9090
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /-/healthy
              port: 9090
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: low-latency-metrics-collector
  namespace: monitoring
  labels:
    app: metrics-collector
spec:
  selector:
    app: metrics-collector
  ports:
    - port: 9090
      targetPort: 9090
      name: http-metrics
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: high-throughput-data-ingester
  namespace: data-pipeline
  labels:
    app: data-ingester
    team: data-engineering
    istio-bypass: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 5
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: data-ingester
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 2
      maxUnavailable: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: data-ingester
        version: v2
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 60
      containers:
        - name: data-ingester
          image: confluentinc/cp-kafka-connect:7.5.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8083
              name: http-connect
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 9092
              name: tcp-kafka
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: CONNECT_BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS
              value: "kafka-broker-0:9092,kafka-broker-1:9092,kafka-broker-2:9092"
            - name: CONNECT_GROUP_ID
              value: "data-ingester-group"
            - name: CONNECT_KEY_CONVERTER
              value: "org.apache.kafka.connect.storage.StringConverter"
            - name: CONNECT_VALUE_CONVERTER
              value: "org.apache.kafka.connect.json.JsonConverter"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 1Gi
            limits:
              cpu: "2"
              memory: 4Gi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /connectors
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /connectors
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 60
            periodSeconds: 20
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: high-throughput-data-ingester
  namespace: data-pipeline
  labels:
    app: data-ingester
spec:
  selector:
    app: data-ingester
  ports:
    - port: 8083
      targetPort: 8083
      name: http-connect
      protocol: TCP
    - port: 9092
      targetPort: 9092
      name: tcp-kafka
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: realtime-cache-proxy
  namespace: caching
  labels:
    app: cache-proxy
    team: platform
    istio-bypass: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: cache-proxy
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: cache-proxy
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: redis-proxy
          image: redis:7.2-alpine
          ports:
            - containerPort: 6379
              name: tcp-redis
              protocol: TCP
          command:
            - redis-server
            - "--maxmemory"
            - "2gb"
            - "--maxmemory-policy"
            - "allkeys-lru"
            - "--tcp-backlog"
            - "511"
            - "--timeout"
            - "0"
            - "--tcp-keepalive"
            - "300"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 512Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 2Gi
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - redis-cli
                - ping
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - redis-cli
                - ping
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: realtime-cache-proxy
  namespace: caching
  labels:
    app: cache-proxy
spec:
  selector:
    app: cache-proxy
  ports:
    - port: 6379
      targetPort: 6379
      name: tcp-redis
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: dns-resolver-service
  namespace: networking
  labels:
    app: dns-resolver
    team: networking
    istio-bypass: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: dns-resolver
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: dns-resolver
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      dnsPolicy: Default
      containers:
        - name: coredns
          image: coredns/coredns:1.11.1
          ports:
            - containerPort: 53
              name: udp-dns
              protocol: UDP
            - containerPort: 53
              name: tcp-dns
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 9153
              name: http-metrics
              protocol: TCP
          args:
            - "-conf"
            - "/etc/coredns/Corefile"
          volumeMounts:
            - name: config-volume
              mountPath: /etc/coredns
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 256Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8181
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
      volumes:
        - name: config-volume
          configMap:
            name: coredns-config
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: dns-resolver-service
  namespace: networking
  labels:
    app: dns-resolver
spec:
  selector:
    app: dns-resolver
  ports:
    - port: 53
      targetPort: 53
      name: udp-dns
      protocol: UDP
    - port: 53
      targetPort: 53
      name: tcp-dns
      protocol: TCP
    - port: 9153
      targetPort: 9153
      name: http-metrics
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: log-forwarder
  namespace: logging
  labels:
    app: log-forwarder
    team: observability
    istio-bypass: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: log-forwarder
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: log-forwarder
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: log-forwarder-sa
      containers:
        - name: fluentd
          image: fluent/fluentd:v1.16-1
          ports:
            - containerPort: 24224
              name: tcp-forward
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 24224
              name: udp-forward
              protocol: UDP
            - containerPort: 9880
              name: http-monitor
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: FLUENT_ELASTICSEARCH_HOST
              value: "elasticsearch.logging.svc.cluster.local"
            - name: FLUENT_ELASTICSEARCH_PORT
              value: "9200"
            - name: NODE_NAME
              valueFrom:
                fieldRef:
                  fieldPath: spec.nodeName
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 512Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 1Gi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /api/plugins.json
              port: 9880
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /api/plugins.json
              port: 9880
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 15
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: log-forwarder
  namespace: logging
  labels:
    app: log-forwarder
spec:
  selector:
    app: log-forwarder
  ports:
    - port: 24224
      targetPort: 24224
      name: tcp-forward
      protocol: TCP
    - port: 24224
      targetPort: 24224
      name: udp-forward
      protocol: UDP
    - port: 9880
      targetPort: 9880
      name: http-monitor
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
